description: India Book II, 57. Part of a copy of the same letter that is preserved in full in IB II, 56 (T-S 16.345, PGPID 5447), a letter from Mahruz to Sulayman b. Abu Zikri Kohen before sailing back to India. Aden, ca. 1137-1147. Goitein and Friedman did not prepare a separate edition and translation for each copy, so please see PGPID 5447 for the edition and translation of the complete copy.
description_he: ספר הודו II,57: העתק חלקי של מכתב ממהרוז לסולימאן בן אבו זכרי כהן לפני הפלגה להודו, כ-1137-47
